# Obseri

> Obseri turns a website URL into a source-grounded AI voice agent and text chatbot trained on that website's content.

## Product

- [Obseri](https://obseri.com/): Product overview, capabilities, trust model, and quick start.
- [AI voice agent for websites](https://obseri.com/ai-voice-agent-for-website): Voice and text agent capabilities, setup, use cases, and buyer questions.
- [AI chatbot trained on your website](https://obseri.com/ai-chatbot-trained-on-your-website): Crawling, source-grounded knowledge, refresh, retrieval testing, and deployment.
- [Soul Studio](https://obseri.com/app): Build and test website knowledge, personality, voice, integrations, and conversations.

## Core capabilities

- Advanced website crawling with robots.txt, sitemap, canonical URL, deduplication, and incremental refresh support.
- Source-grounded retrieval with citations and pre-launch retrieval testing.
- Custom personality, greeting, boundaries, escalation behavior, and lead intent.
- Real-time voice and text website assistant experiences.
- Embeddable website widget, signed events, and webhook integrations.

## Contact

- Email: flamki@obseri.com
